# Free Crypto News - Complete API Reference

This is the full documentation for AI agents and LLMs.

## About

Free Crypto News is a 100% free, open-source cryptocurrency news aggregator API. No API keys, no rate limits, no authentication required.

**Base URL:** https://news-crypto.vercel.app

---

## News Endpoints

### GET /api/news
Get latest cryptocurrency news articles.

**Parameters:**
- `limit` (int, default: 20, max: 100) - Number of articles
- `page` (int, default: 1) - Page number
- `category` (string) - Filter by category: bitcoin, ethereum, defi, nft, regulation, altcoins
- `source` (string) - Filter by source name
- `lang` (string) - Language code: en, zh, ko, ja, es, etc.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "abc123",
      "title": "Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High",
      "description": "BTC surges past $100,000...",
      "url": "https://example.com/article",
      "source": "CoinDesk",
      "publishedAt": "2026-02-02T10:30:00Z",
      "category": "bitcoin",
      "sentiment": "bullish",
      "imageUrl": "https://..."
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 1000, "page": 1, "limit": 20 }
}
```

### GET /api/news/[id]
Get a single article by ID.

### GET /api/search
Search news articles.

**Parameters:**
- `q` (string, required) - Search query
- `limit` (int) - Number of results
- `from` (ISO date) - Start date
- `to` (ISO date) - End date
- `source` (string) - Filter by source

### GET /api/trending
Get trending topics and tickers.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "topics": ["ETF approval", "Layer 2", "Memecoin"],
  "tickers": ["BTC", "ETH", "SOL", "DOGE"],
  "hashtags": ["#Bitcoin", "#Ethereum", "#DeFi"]
}
```

### GET /api/breaking
Get breaking news alerts.

### GET /api/sources
List all available news sources.

---

## AI Analysis Endpoints

### GET /api/ai/sentiment
Get AI-analyzed sentiment for an asset.

**Parameters:**
- `asset` (string, required) - Asset symbol (BTC, ETH, etc.)
- `period` (string) - Time period: 1h, 24h, 7d

**Response:**
```json
{
  "asset": "BTC",
  "sentiment": "bullish",
  "score": 0.72,
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "signals": {
    "news": 0.8,
    "social": 0.65,
    "technical": 0.7
  }
}
```

### GET /api/ai/brief
AI-generated daily market intelligence brief.

### POST /api/ai/summarize
Summarize article content.

**Body:**
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "maxLength": 200
}
```

### POST /api/ai/debate
Generate bull vs bear analysis.

**Body:**
```json
{
  "topic": "Will Bitcoin reach $200k in 2026?"
}
```

### POST /api/ai/counter
Fact-check claims and generate counter-arguments.

**Body:**
```json
{
  "claim": "Ethereum will flip Bitcoin by 2027",
  "context": "Market cap comparison"
}
```

---

## Market Data Endpoints

### GET /api/market/coins
Top cryptocurrencies by market cap.

**Parameters:**
- `limit` (int, default: 100)
- `page` (int)
- `category` (string) - defi, nft, layer-1, meme, etc.

### GET /api/market/coin/[id]
Detailed data for a specific coin.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "bitcoin",
  "symbol": "BTC",
  "name": "Bitcoin",
  "price": 98500.00,
  "marketCap": 1950000000000,
  "volume24h": 45000000000,
  "change24h": 2.5,
  "change7d": 8.2,
  "ath": 109000,
  "athDate": "2025-12-15",
  "circulatingSupply": 19800000,
  "maxSupply": 21000000
}
```

### GET /api/market/fear-greed
Fear & Greed Index.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "value": 72,
  "classification": "Greed",
  "previousValue": 68,
  "change": 4
}
```

### GET /api/market/global
Global crypto market statistics.

### GET /api/market/ohlc/[id]
OHLC (candlestick) price data.

**Parameters:**
- `days` (int) - Number of days: 1, 7, 14, 30, 90, 180, 365

---

## Trading Endpoints

### GET /api/signals
AI-generated trading signals.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "signals": [
    {
      "asset": "BTC",
      "type": "buy",
      "strength": "strong",
      "price": 98500,
      "target": 105000,
      "stopLoss": 94000,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "reason": "Golden cross on 4H chart"
    }
  ]
}
```

### GET /api/whale-alerts
Large transaction alerts.

**Parameters:**
- `minValue` (int, default: 1000000) - Minimum USD value

### GET /api/liquidations
Exchange liquidation data.

### GET /api/funding
Perpetual futures funding rates.

### GET /api/arbitrage
Cross-exchange arbitrage opportunities.

---

## Real-time Streaming

### GET /api/sse/news
Server-sent events stream for live news.

```javascript
const eventSource = new EventSource('https://news-crypto.vercel.app/api/sse/news');
eventSource.onmessage = (event) => {
  const article = JSON.parse(event.data);
  console.log('New article:', article.title);
};
```

### GET /api/sse/prices
Live price updates via SSE.

### WebSocket
```javascript
const ws = new WebSocket('wss://news-crypto.vercel.app/ws');
ws.onmessage = (event) => {
  const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
};
```

---

## Export Formats

### GET /api/rss
RSS 2.0 feed.

### GET /api/atom
Atom feed.

### GET /api/opml
OPML export of all sources.

### GET /api/export/csv
Export news as CSV.

### GET /api/export/json
Export news as JSON.

---

## Utility Endpoints

### GET /api/health
API health check.

### GET /api/stats
API usage statistics.

### GET /api/openapi.json
OpenAPI 3.1 specification.

---

## SDKs

Official SDKs are available:

- **Python:** `pip install free-crypto-news`
- **JavaScript/TypeScript:** `npm install @nirholas/crypto-news`
- **React:** `npm install @nirholas/react-crypto-news`
- **Go:** `go get github.com/nirholas/free-crypto-news-go`
- **Rust:** Add `fcn-sdk = "0.2"` to Cargo.toml

---

## Rate Limits

There are no rate limits for public endpoints. Premium endpoints (x402) require micropayments.

---

## Self-Hosting

```bash
git clone https://github.com/nirholas/free-crypto-news
cd free-crypto-news
npm install
npm run dev
```

Deploy to Vercel, Railway, or any Node.js host.
